one_time_description: Land Surrender Claim Distributions of $2,674,061 (significantly higher than budget of $50,000 and prior year $1,050,000)
economic_notes: Nation operates Alexander Employment and Labour Services Ltd., 824750 Alberta Ltd. (o/a Alexander Forestry Services), Alexander First Nation Farm Enterprises as subsidiaries. Government business enterprise accounted for under modified equity method. Nation also has Farm operations, Forestry operations, and Kipohtakawkmik Lodge.
notes: Deficit of revenues over expenses is $259,596 after other income/expenses. The Nation changed its consolidation approach in 2020 adding a government business enterprise (GBE) accounted for under modified equity method resulting in a change in consolidation adjustment of -$946,450 to opening accumulated surplus. Investment in government business enterprises of $237,007 recorded on balance sheet. Loss from Government Business Enterprises of $731,166 recorded. ISC band funds capital account income $1,333,700 and revenue account income $142,714 recorded as other income. Transfer of band funds to other departments $2,484,380 recorded as expense. Restricted capital and revenue trust funds balance $881,160. Total government transfers calculated as: ISC funding ($13,551,372) + Health Canada ($5,738,650) + Province of Alberta ($2,519,563) + CMHC ($614,930) + Service Canada ($399,670) + FNDF ($572,019) - contributions carried to next year net = approximation used summing all government sources.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
